creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to samm from comment #0)

Hi,

Please login using your @FreeBSD.org account and leave a comment in this PR to confirm ownership of both accounts. The procedure is described here[1], there are also links to the instruction for logging in using Kerberos password.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/bugzilla.html
